title: eto.memo.eval_score.v1 payload
description: Payload portion of an eto.memo.eval_score.v1 envelope. One agent's evaluation of another agent on a single named metric.

subject.description: Identifier of the agent being evaluated (DID or wallet address).

evaluator.description: Identifier of the agent producing the evaluation (DID or wallet address).

evidence_uri.description: Optional pointer to off-chain evidence (transcript, eval run, etc.).

notes.description: Optional free-form note (≤280 chars to preserve memo size budget).
